title: Optical_Transfer_Function_measuments_of_technically_premixed_flames
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 3]
Here is the technical content extracted from the provided image:

**1. Mathematical equations:**

*   I = k * m^alpha * p^beta
*   Q'/Q = m'/m + y'/y
*   I'/I = m'/m + alpha *(y'/y) + beta * (p'/p)
*   m'/m = Sf/S1 * Af/A1 + p'/p
*   p'/p = (rho*c*u') / (gamma *p) = (rho*cu') / (gamma *p) = u'/u = m'/m
*   Q'/Q = r'/r = I'/I
*   Q'/Q = r'/r = 1/alpha * I'/I = 1/alpha * (dQ/dy)

**2. Graphs/charts:**
*   **Title:** Transmission curve of the filters used and flame spectrum from a test flame.
    *   **Axes:**
        *   x-axis: wavelength / nm. 260 to 640 nm, with increments of 20, 40 and 60 nm
        *   y-axis (left): Flame spectrum/counts/s
        *   y-axis (right): Transmission / Filter, from 0% to 100%
    *   **Curves:**
        *   Flame
        *   CW_515
        *   CW_430
        *   CW_307
        *   CW_450
        *   DUG11X
    *   Key values (estimated from the graph):
        *   CW_307 peaks at around 310nm, with 90% transmission
        *   CW_450 is mainly at 450 nm, with 90% transmission
        *   CW_430 is mainly between 420-440 nm, with 80% transmission
        *  DUG11X peaks at 560 nm, with 40% transmission
        *   Flame Spectrum peaks at 310 nm and 430 nm

**3. Tables:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**4. Diagrams:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**5. Key numbers, constants, parameters:**

*   alpha = 5.23
*   beta = -0.86
*   alpha ranges between 5 and 10

title: Optical_Transfer_Function_measuments_of_technically_premixed_flames
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 4]
**1. Mathematical equations**

(9) [I'1; I'2] = [1 alpha1; 1 alpha2] [m'/m; y'/y]

(10) [I'1; ...; I'K] = [m/m dI1/dm y/y dI1/dy; ...; m/m dIK/dm y/y dIK/dy] [m'/m; y'/y] = J [m'/m; y'/y]

(11) [m'/m; y'/y] = J_dagger [I'1; ...; I'K] where J_dagger = (X*X)^-1 X*

(12) F(omega) = Q_hat/Q / (u_hat1/u1)

(13) [m_hat/m; Q_hat/(y/SA); u_hat1/u1] = [C11 C12; C21 C22] [p_hat1; u_hat1]

(14) [C11 C12; C21 C22] = [m_hatA/m m_hatB/m; Q_hatA/(y/SA) Q_hatB/(y/SB)] * [p_hatA p_hatB; u_hatA u_hatB]^-1

(15) u_hat2 = u_hat1 + (T2/T1 - 1) Q_hat/Q

(16) F21 = (T2/T1 - 1)(C11 + C21)

(17) F22 = 1 + (T2/T1 - 1)(C12 + C22)

(18) [p_hatd; u_hatd] = [T11 T12; T21 T22] [p_hatu; u_hatu]

**2. Graphs/charts**
NO_VISUAL_CONTENT
**3. Tables**
NO_VISUAL_CONTENT
**4. Diagrams**
NO_VISUAL_CONTENT
**5. Key numbers, constants, parameters**

*   m : instantaneous mass flux
*   y: something being measured along with mass flux m
*   SA, SB: scales
*   Alpha1, Alpha2
*   K : number of species.
*   T: acoustic transfer matrix
*   d, u : refer to locations upstream and downstream of the element.
*   : acoustic pressure
*   u: acoustic velocity
*  omega - angular frequency
*   rho - density of gas
*   c - speed of sound
*   p: pressure
*  Q: magnitude of heat release
*   T - Temperature

title: Optical_Transfer_Function_measuments_of_technically_premixed_flames
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 5]
Here's a breakdown of the technical content extracted from the image, as requested:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   (19):
    ```
    [T11 T12; T21 T22] = [pA_d pˆA_u; uˆA_d uˆA_u] [pˆB_d pˆB_u; uˆB_d uˆB_u]^-1
    ```
*   Wave Equation:
    ```
    pˆ(ω,x) = f(ω)e^(-i(ω/c)(x/(1+M))) + ĝ(ω)e^(i(ω/c)(x/(1-M)))
    ```

*   (20):
    ```
    [pˆ1; ... ; pˆN] = Z [f; g]
    ```

    with *z<sub>n</sub>* as `e^(-i(wx/c))`

*   (21):
    ```
    [f; g] = Z† [pˆ1; ... ; pˆN]
    ```

*   (22):
    ```
    [pˆA_1; uˆA_1] = [1 1; 1 -1] Z† [pˆB_1; pˆB_1]
    ```

*   (23):
    ```
    F = TB^-1
    ```
*  E=1/N∑I-In/In

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

*   **Fig. 3: Normalized mean chemiluminescence intensity.**
    *   **Left Graph:**
        *   **Axes:**
            *   x-axis: T - T<sub>ref</sub> \[K]
            *   y-axis: I / I<sub>ref</sub>
        *   **Curves:**
            *   Solid line, crosses, circles
    *   **Right Graph:**
        *   **Axes:**
            *   x-axis: m / m<sub>ref</sub>
            *   y-axis: I / I<sub>ref</sub>
        *   **Curves:**
            *   Solid line, crosses, circles

*   **Fig. 4: Comparison of Heat Release Obtained from Acoustic Data**
    *   **Upper Graph:**
        *   **Axes:**
            *   x-axis: H<sub>e</sub> = ωL / (2πc)
            *   y-axis: (Q'-Q)/Q
        *   **Curves:**
            *   Dashed (acoustic data)
            *   Solid (optical data)
            *   Dash-dotted
    *   **Lower Graph:**
        *   **Axes:**
           *   x-axis: H<sub>e</sub> = ωL / (2πc)
           *   y-axis: (Q'-Q)/Q
        *   **Curves:**
            *   Dashed (acoustic data)
            *   Solid (optical data)
            *   Dash-dotted


**3. Tables:** NO_TABLE_CONTENT
**4. Diagrams:** NO_DIAGRAM_CONTENT
**5. Key Numbers/Constants/Parameters:**

*   **N:** number of microphones
*  **α:** exponent
*   **k:** constant
*   **M:** mean flow
*   **ω:** frequency
*   **x:** position
*   **c:** speed of sound
*    **(Q'-Q)/Q:** Intensity fluctuations
*   **R²:** Measure for the explained variation of the data
*   **T:** temperature
*   **Tref:** reference temperature
*

title: Optical_Transfer_Function_measuments_of_technically_premixed_flames
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 6]
Here's the requested technical content:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   Q_hat = (u2_hat - B12 * p0_hat - B22 * u0_hat) / (T2_bar - T1_bar) * (T1_bar - 1) / u1_hat
    (Equation 24)

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

*   **Figure 5: Comparison of transfer matrix elements F12 and F22:**
    *   X-axis: He = oL / (2 * pi * c)
    *   Y-axis (Top Left): |T12| (no units given)
        *   Curves: Dotted (acoustic data), Solid (optical data)
    *   Y-axis (Top Right): |T22| (no units given)
        *   Curves: Dotted (acoustic data), Solid (optical data)
    *  Y-axis (Bottom Left): Angle T12 (no units given)
        *   Curves: Dotted (acoustic data), Solid (optical data)
    *   Y-axis (Bottom Right): Angle T22 (no units given)
        *   Curves: Dotted (acoustic data), Solid (optical data)
*   **Figure 6: Absolute values (solid) and phase (dashed) of the matrix elements of C:**
    *   X-axis: He = oL / (2 * pi * c)
    *   Y-axis (Top Left): |C11| (no units given)
        *   Curves: Solid, Dashed
    *   Y-axis (Top Right): Angle C11, pi/2 (no units given)
        *   Curves: Solid, Dashed -pi
    *   Y-axis (Middle Left): |C12| (no units given)
        *   Curves: Solid, Dashed-2, pi/2
    *   Y-axis (Middle Right): Angle C12 (no units given), -pi
        *   Curves: Solid, Dashed
    *   Y-axis (Bottom Left): |C21| (no units given)
        *   Curves: Solid, Dashed
    *   Y-axis (Bottom Right): Angle C21, pi/2 (no units given)
        *   Curves: Solid, Dashed -pi
     *    Y-axis (Down Left): |C22| (no units given)
        *   Curves: Solid, Dashed
    *   Y-axis (Down Right): Angle C22, pi/2 (no units given)
        *   Curves: Solid, Dashed -pi

**3. Tables:**

*   **Table 1: Results of curve fitting the data with Eq. (2); values of alpha, the relative error E in %, and the goodness of fit R² in %**

    | Filter    | No filter | F1   | F2   | F3   | F4   |
    | :-------- | :-------- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
    | alpha/alpha_r | 1         | 1.13 | 1.05 | 0.93 | 0.91 |
    | E         | 1.2       | 1.3  | 1.3  | 1.1  | 1.5  |
    | R²        | 99.6      | 99.6 | 99.6 | 99.6 | 99.4 |

**
